messages.content: Could you please specify which Rambo bike model you are inquiring about that has a 500W mid-drive motor? This will help me provide you with the most accurate information.
Had bike for year and motor went how do I get new one
To assist you better, could you please provide the exact model name and year of your bike? Additionally, if you have the serial number, that would help in identifying the correct motor replacement.

To speak with a customer service representative, you can call us at (952) 283-0777 during business hours, which are Monday to Friday from 8:30 AM to 4:30 PM CST. They will be able to assist you with your motor replacement issue.
